However, it has come to my attention that the down payment made by me was not applied to my loan amount as initially stated. This discrepancy has caused significant harm to my creditworthiness over a period of seven years, which is a substantial violation of my rights as a consumer. 

In light of these findings, I hereby exercise my right to rescind the transaction under 15 U.S.C. 1635. I request that the transaction be immediately rescinded, and I be provided with a full refund of the down payment amount. According to 15 U.S.C. 1681n ( a ) ( 1 ), I am entitled to compensation for each inaccuracy in my credit report. Given the multiple inaccuracies in my credit report and the resulting harm caused to my creditworthiness, I expect an appropriate compensation amount to be awarded to me.

I expect Credit Acceptance to promptly investigate these matters, take the necessary actions to rectify the inaccuracies in my credit report and transaction history, and provide me with a written confirmation of the rescission of the transaction, along with a detailed breakdown of the refund amount.
